info.title: Light OSS API
info.description: OpenAPI 3.0 JSON for APIFOX import. Route coverage is derived from backend/internal/handler/router.go and excludes site content routes outside /api/v1 and /healthz.

get.description: Returns service and database health without authentication.

503.description: Service is up but the database check degraded. The body keeps the normal success envelope.

get.description: Same payload as /healthz, but requires a Bearer token.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

503.description: Service is up but the database check degraded. The body keeps the normal success envelope.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

500.description: Failed to list buckets. Error code: bucket_list_failed.

400.description: Request body or bucket name is invalid. Error codes: invalid_request, invalid_bucket_name.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

409.description: Bucket already exists. Error code: bucket_exists.

500.description: Failed to create bucket. Error code: bucket_create_failed.

delete.description: Deletes the bucket together with all objects, folder markers, linked sites, and bound domains. Storage file cleanup runs after metadata deletion succeeds.

400.description: Bucket name is invalid. Error code: invalid_bucket_name.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Bucket not found. Error code: bucket_not_found.

500.description: Failed to delete bucket. Error codes: bucket_lookup_failed, bucket_delete_failed.

get.description: Returns all known folder nodes for a bucket, including empty folders created through the folder marker object.

400.description: Bucket name is invalid. Error code: invalid_bucket_name.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Bucket not found. Error code: bucket_not_found.

500.description: Failed to list folders. Error codes: bucket_lookup_failed, folder_list_failed.

400.description: Request body or folder input is invalid. Error codes: invalid_request, invalid_bucket_name, invalid_prefix, invalid_folder_name.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Bucket or parent folder was not found. Error codes: bucket_not_found, folder_not_found.

409.description: Folder already exists. Error code: folder_exists.

500.description: Folder creation failed. Error codes: bucket_lookup_failed, folder_lookup_failed, object_store_failed, object_metadata_failed.

delete.description: When recursive is omitted or false, only empty folders can be deleted. When recursive is true, the folder and all nested files/subfolders are soft-deleted.

400.description: Bucket name, folder path, or recursive query is invalid. Error codes: invalid_bucket_name, invalid_folder_path, invalid_request, invalid_prefix.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Folder not found. Error code: folder_not_found.

409.description: Folder is not empty and recursive delete was not enabled. Error code: folder_not_empty.

500.description: Folder deletion failed. Error codes: folder_lookup_failed, folder_delete_failed.

get.summary: Download a folder as a ZIP archive
get.description: Streams a ZIP archive for the requested non-root folder path. The archive keeps the current folder name as the top-level directory, includes nested files, preserves empty subfolders created by the folder marker object, and excludes the internal .light-oss-folder marker file.

400.description: Bucket name or folder path is invalid. Error codes: invalid_bucket_name, invalid_folder_path, invalid_prefix.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Bucket or folder not found. Error codes: bucket_not_found, folder_not_found.

500.description: Folder archive preparation failed. Error codes: bucket_lookup_failed, folder_lookup_failed, folder_archive_failed.

get.summary: List direct entries under a folder prefix
get.description: Entries are ordered with directories first, then files, both sorted by name. next_cursor is an opaque cursor for the same prefix/search combination.

400.description: Bucket name, prefix, or cursor is invalid. Error codes: invalid_bucket_name, invalid_prefix, invalid_cursor.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Bucket not found. Error code: bucket_not_found.

500.description: Failed to list explorer entries. Error codes: bucket_lookup_failed, explorer_list_failed.

get.description: Objects are returned newest first. next_cursor is an opaque cursor for the same prefix filter.

400.description: Bucket name, prefix, or cursor is invalid. Error codes: invalid_bucket_name, invalid_prefix, invalid_cursor.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Bucket not found. Error code: bucket_not_found.

500.description: Failed to list objects. Error codes: bucket_lookup_failed, object_list_failed.

post.description: manifest is a JSON string array. Each item declares file_field and relative_path. Additional file parts must use the exact field names referenced by manifest[].file_field.

400.description: Multipart payload, manifest, bucket name, prefix, visibility, or final object key is invalid. Error codes include invalid_multipart_request, invalid_batch_manifest, batch_file_missing, invalid_bucket_name, invalid_prefix, invalid_visibility.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Bucket not found. Error code: bucket_not_found.

409.description: One or more object keys already exist and overwrite was not allowed. Error code: object_exists.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured upload size. Error code: payload_too_large.

500.description: Batch upload failed. Error codes may include bucket_lookup_failed, object_lookup_failed, batch_file_buffer_failed, batch_file_open_failed, object_store_failed, object_metadata_failed.

get.description: Public objects can be downloaded anonymously. Private objects require either Authorization: Bearer <token> or a signed URL using expires and signature query parameters.

200.description: Object content. The actual media type mirrors the stored object Content-Type header.

400.description: Bucket name or object key is invalid. Error codes: invalid_bucket_name, invalid_object_key.

401.description: Private object access was not authorized. Error codes: unauthorized, invalid_signature, signature_expired.

404.description: Object not found. Error code: object_not_found.

500.description: Failed to open object content. Error codes: object_lookup_failed, object_open_failed.

head.description: Returns metadata headers without a body. Public objects can be inspected anonymously. Private objects require Authorization: Bearer <token>; signed URLs are not accepted for HEAD.

200.description: Object headers only. No response body.

400.description: Bucket name or object key is invalid. Error codes: invalid_bucket_name, invalid_object_key.

401.description: Private object access requires a valid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Object not found. Error code: object_not_found.

500.description: Failed to open object content. Error codes: object_lookup_failed, object_open_failed.

put.description: The request body is streamed directly into storage. X-Object-Visibility defaults to private when omitted. X-Allow-Overwrite defaults to false when omitted.

400.description: Bucket name, object key, or visibility is invalid. Error codes: invalid_bucket_name, invalid_object_key, invalid_visibility.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Bucket not found. Error code: bucket_not_found.

409.description: Object key already exists and overwrite was not allowed. Error code: object_exists.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured upload size. Error code: payload_too_large.

500.description: Upload failed. Error codes: bucket_lookup_failed, object_lookup_failed, object_store_failed, object_metadata_failed.

400.description: Bucket name or object key is invalid. Error codes: invalid_bucket_name, invalid_object_key.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Object not found. Error code: object_not_found.

500.description: Failed to delete object. Error code: object_delete_failed.

400.description: Request body, bucket name, object key, or visibility is invalid. Error codes: invalid_request, invalid_bucket_name, invalid_object_key, invalid_visibility.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Object not found. Error code: object_not_found.

500.description: Failed to update object visibility. Error code: object_update_failed.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

500.description: Failed to list sites. Error code: site_list_failed.

post.description: Site domains must be valid hostnames. root_prefix is normalized to end with a trailing slash. index_document defaults to index.html when omitted or empty. enabled defaults to true. spa_fallback defaults to false.

400.description: Request body or site configuration is invalid. Error codes: invalid_request, invalid_bucket_name, invalid_website_config, invalid_domain.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Bucket not found. Error code: bucket_not_found.

409.description: One of the domains is already bound to another site. Error code: domain_conflict.

500.description: Site creation failed. Error codes: bucket_lookup_failed, site_create_failed.

post.summary: Upload a folder and publish a site
post.description: Accepts a browser folder upload, preserves the selected top-level folder name, stores every object as public, and creates a site binding in one request.

400.description: Multipart form, manifest, domains, bucket, prefix, or site configuration is invalid. Error codes: invalid_multipart_request, invalid_request, invalid_batch_manifest, invalid_bucket_name, invalid_prefix, invalid_website_config, invalid_domain, batch_file_missing.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Bucket not found. Error code: bucket_not_found.

409.description: One of the domains is already bound to another site. Error code: domain_conflict.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured upload size. Error code: payload_too_large.

500.description: Site publish failed. Error codes: bucket_lookup_failed, batch_file_buffer_failed, batch_file_open_failed, object_store_failed, object_metadata_failed, site_create_failed.

post.summary: Upload a file and publish a site
post.description: Accepts one uploaded file, stores it as a public object, and creates a site whose index document is the uploaded file name.

400.description: Multipart form, domains, bucket, parent prefix, file name, or site configuration is invalid. Error codes: invalid_request, invalid_bucket_name, invalid_prefix, invalid_website_config, invalid_domain.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Bucket not found. Error code: bucket_not_found.

409.description: One of the domains is already bound to another site. Error code: domain_conflict.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured upload size. Error code: payload_too_large.

500.description: Site publish failed. Error codes: batch_file_open_failed, object_store_failed, object_metadata_failed, site_create_failed, bucket_lookup_failed.

400.description: siteID is invalid. Error code: invalid_site_id.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Site not found. Error code: site_not_found.

500.description: Failed to look up site. Error code: site_lookup_failed.

put.description: The same validation rules and defaults as createSite apply to the incoming body.

400.description: siteID, request body, or site configuration is invalid. Error codes: invalid_site_id, invalid_request, invalid_bucket_name, invalid_website_config, invalid_domain.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Site or bucket not found. Error codes: site_not_found, bucket_not_found.

409.description: One of the domains is already bound to another site. Error code: domain_conflict.

500.description: Site update failed. Error codes: bucket_lookup_failed, site_update_failed.

400.description: siteID is invalid. Error code: invalid_site_id.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

404.description: Site not found. Error code: site_not_found.

500.description: Site deletion failed. Error code: site_delete_failed.

post.description: Creates a temporary signed URL for GET object downloads. The current environment defaults expires_in_seconds to 300 when the client sends 0 or a negative value, and rejects values above 86400.

400.description: Request body, bucket name, object key, or expiry is invalid. Error codes: invalid_request, invalid_bucket_name, invalid_object_key, invalid_expiry.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. Error code: unauthorized.

KeyParam.name: key
KeyParam.description: Object key. This placeholder represents Gin's /*key wildcard and may contain '/'. Pass the raw key path without a leading slash. Max length: 512. Path traversal and reserved folder marker names are rejected where applicable.

PrefixQuery.name: prefix
PrefixQuery.description: Optional prefix filter. Max length: 512. Folder-style prefixes should usually end with '/'.

SearchQuery.name: search
SearchQuery.description: Case-insensitive substring filter applied to direct entry names.

BucketSearchQuery.name: search
BucketSearchQuery.description: Case-insensitive substring filter applied to bucket names.

CursorQuery.name: cursor
CursorQuery.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous page.

FolderPathQuery.name: path
FolderPathQuery.description: Folder path to delete. Must be a non-empty folder path ending with '/'.

RecursiveQuery.name: recursive
RecursiveQuery.description: When true, delete the folder recursively. When omitted or false, only empty folders can be deleted.

OptionalAuthorizationHeader.name: Authorization
OptionalAuthorizationHeader.description: Optional bearer token in the form `Bearer <token>`. Required for protected management endpoints, and conditionally required for private object reads as documented on each operation.

UploadVisibilityHeader.name: X-Object-Visibility
UploadVisibilityHeader.description: Object visibility. Defaults to private when omitted.

AllowOverwriteHeader.name: X-Allow-Overwrite
AllowOverwriteHeader.description: Whether to allow replacing existing objects with the same key. Defaults to false when omitted.

OriginalFilenameHeader.name: X-Original-Filename
OriginalFilenameHeader.description: Original file name shown in metadata and download headers. URL-escaped values are decoded by the backend and sanitized to a safe base name.

DownloadExpiresQuery.name: expires
DownloadExpiresQuery.description: UNIX timestamp used together with signature for signed private-object downloads.

DownloadSignatureQuery.name: signature
DownloadSignatureQuery.description: Signature used together with expires for signed private-object downloads.

ETagHeader.description: Entity tag generated for the stored object content.

request_id.description: Request correlation ID returned by middleware.

name.description: Bucket name. Lowercase letters, digits, dot, and hyphen only.

prefix.description: Parent folder prefix. Use an empty string for the bucket root. Non-empty values must end with '/'.

name.description: Folder name. Must not contain '/', '\\', NUL, '.', '..', or '.light-oss-folder'.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page. Empty string when there is no next page.
Opaque cursor for the next page. Empty string when there is no next page.

relative_path.description: Relative object path under the supplied prefix. Must not start with '/'.

prefix.description: Optional folder prefix. Non-empty values must end with '/'.

visibility.description: Visibility applied to every uploaded object. Defaults to private when omitted.

manifest.description: JSON string array of UploadBatchManifestItem objects.

additionalProperties.description: Additional multipart file parts referenced by manifest[].file_field.

expires_in_seconds.description: TTL in seconds. Values <= 0 use the server default in the current environment.

root_prefix.description: Root folder prefix. Leading slash is stripped. Non-empty values are normalized to end with '/'.

index_document.description: Document path relative to root_prefix. Defaults to index.html.

error_document.description: Optional error document path relative to root_prefix.

domains.description: Optional domain bindings. Each item must be a valid hostname.

parent_prefix.description: Optional parent folder prefix. Leading slash is stripped. Non-empty values are normalized to end with '/'.

domains.description: JSON string array of site domains. At least one domain is required.

manifest.description: JSON string array of UploadBatchManifestItem objects. Every relative_path must share the same top-level folder name.

additionalProperties.description: Additional multipart file parts referenced by manifest[].file_field.

parent_prefix.description: Optional parent folder prefix. Leading slash is stripped. Non-empty values are normalized to end with '/'.

domains.description: JSON string array of site domains. At least one domain is required.

file.description: The single file to upload and publish as the site index document.
